issue_title: [Bug]: preMergeLocales silently produces empty translations when page locale stubs don't exist (CI/production builds)
issue_body_preview:
Hello, first of all, thanks for creating this great alternative to the official i18n module.

> This Issue was created with the help of AI but should not contain any slop as I was proof reading it attentively.

## 🔗 Reproduction

**Repository URL:** https://github.com/PatrikBird/i18nbugrepro

That's
test_description_zh: 在使用 preMergeLocales 配置的 Nuxt 项目中，创建仅包含全局翻译文件（不包含页面级别的 locale stub 文件）的多语言配置，执行生产构建后访问页面，观察翻译内容是否正常显示。
expected_result_zh: 页面上应正确显示全局翻译文件中定义的翻译文本，即使页面级别不存在对应的 locale stub 文件，翻译内容也不应为空或丢失。
